channel.title: SevenAtSevenSection1
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SevenAtSevenSection1, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: U.K. considers cutting ex-Prince Andrew from line of succession over his Epstein ties
item.description: Andrew Mountbatten-Windsor, the British former prince, is being investigated on suspicion of misconduct in having shared confidential trade informatio...

item.title: Trump calls SCOTUS tariffs decision 'deeply disappointing' and lays out path forward
item.description: President Trump claimed the justices opposing his position were acting because of partisanship, though three of those ruling against his tariffs were ...

item.title: NASA eyes March 6 to launch 4 astronauts to the moon on Artemis II mission
item.description: The four astronauts heading to the moon for the lunar fly-by are the first humans to venture there since 1972. The ten-day mission will travel more th...

item.title: The U.S. men's hockey team to face Slovakia for a spot in an Olympic gold medal match
item.description: After an overtime nailbiter in the quarterfinals, the Americans return to the ice Friday in Milan to face the upstart Slovakia for a chance to play Ca...

item.title: On pins and needles: Why Olympians pass the time knitting
item.description: A number of Olympic athletes have turned to knitting during the heat of the Games, including Ben Ogden, who this week became the most decorated Americ...

item.title: The Biggest Homebuyer Discounts in Over 12 Years | Feb. 2026 Update
item.description: Homebuyers are getting the biggest discounts on properties in over 12 years—and it’s only getting started. At this point, nobody can refute that a ful...

item.title: Should I Use My Home Equity to Buy My Next Rental Property? (Rookie Reply)
item.description: Should you use your home equity to buy a rental property? Whether it’s your primary residence or another investment property, this strategy could help...

item.title: NASA targets March for first moon mission by Artemis astronauts after fueling test success
Apple’s iOS 26.4 arrives in public beta with AI music playlists, video podcasts, and more
item.description: Several updates are introduced in iOS 26.4, including an AI-powered playlist-generation feature in Apple Music, support for video content in the Podca...

item.title: InScope nabs $14.5M to solve the pain of financial reporting
item.description: The startup, founded by accountants who worked at Flexport, Miro, Hopin and Thrive Global, automates the difficulties of prepping financial statements...

item.title: All truckers and bus drivers will be required to take commercial driver’s license tests in English
Remember HQ? ‘Quiz Daddy’ Scott Rogowsky is back with TextSavvy, a daily mobile game show
item.description: The former HQ host Scott Rogowsky is back with TextSavvy, a live mobile game show that he's building on his own terms.

item.title: Supreme Court strikes down Trump’s sweeping tariffs, upending central plank of his economic agenda
item.description: President Donald Trump says he’s imposing a temporary global tariff of 10% after his far-reaching tariff regimen was struck down by the Supreme Court.

item.title: Anthropic-funded group backs candidate attacked by rival AI super PAC
item.description: Dueling pro-AI PACs have centered around backing or targeting one New York congressional bid: Alex Bores, whose RAISE Act requires AI developers to di...

item.title: Great news for xAI: Grok is now pretty good at answering questions about Baldur’s Gate
item.description: A new report from Business Insider reveals that high-level engineers at xAI were pulled off other projects to make sure Grok could answer detailed que...

item.title: Off by Nearly 1 MILLION Jobs? Why New Jobs Report Will Impact Rentals
item.description: Big economic news dropped last week: labor data, inflation rates, and huge jobs revisions. All of these are already impacting the housing market, but ...

item.title: How the Wealthiest Have Programmed Their Portfolios This Year
item.description: Despite stock markets hovering around record highs, investors are feeling jittery. You can see it in consumer confidence collapsing to its lowest leve...

item.title: The Housing For the 21st Century Act Brings Game Changers For Multifamily Investors
item.description: There’s nothing that unifies opposing political factions faster than seeing homeless encampments in American cities. That’s why the Housing for the 21...
